name: Wei Yan

	 Other Names

	 Name Notes 
	Sometimes ‘Wey Yan’ to avoid confusion with Wei Yan of Shu. Called ‘Wei Yin’ the the Brewitt-Taylor translation.

full_text:
Wei Yan 衛演
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wei Yan (衛演). Sent to offer the Heir Apprant as hostage to Sima Yi but was refused. Wei Yan may not have existed in history. Wei Yan was affiliated with Gongsun Yuan.
